_comment: Mock stats for fields that have no dedicated backend API yet. Replace each field with real API calls as endpoints are built.

_todo.awaitingPaymentAmount: GET /api/invoices?status=SENT — sum of invoice amounts with status SENT/OVERDUE. See CONTEXT.md §7.2
_todo.activeProjects: Derived from GET /api/projects — count status IN_PROGRESS or PLANNING. Or use GET /api/dashboard/summary once built. See CONTEXT.md §7.3
_todo.upcomingDeadlines: Derived from project list — count deadline within next 30 days. Or use GET /api/dashboard/summary.
